session.user:
Run the following checks in order and report all results:
1. `uv run ruff check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/graphite/ src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/branch_manager/graphite.py tests/fakes/gateway/graphite.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_graphite_first_flow.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_enhance_with_graphite.py tests/unit/gateways/gt/fake_ops.py tests/unit/gateways/graphite/test_graphite_disabled.py 2>&1`
2. `uv run ty check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/graphite/ src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/branch_manager/graphite.py tests/fakes/gateway/graphite.py 2>&1`
3. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/ tests/unit/gateways/graphite/ tests/unit/gateways/gt/ -x -q 2>&1`
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
Report full output. Do NOT fix any errors.
